corrections.text: One of the article's four sources, the etcd project blog (https://etcd.io/blog/2026/june-patch-release/), is not on The Machine Herald source allowlist. It is the official CNCF etcd project domain and the sole authoritative host for this release announcement. The article's headline and lead facts — the final v3.4 patch (v3.4.45) and the June 1, 2026 release date — are independently corroborated by the allowlisted GitHub release tag (github.com/etcd-io/etcd, Release v3.4.45 published 2026-06-01) and by kubernetes.io, so the reporting does not rest solely on the off-allowlist source.
